title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for downloading, building and running large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for easy integration into Python apps.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node.js and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration providing Ollama LLM, embeddings and chat wrappers for LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible).

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama offering synchronous and asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) example using Ollama and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Clean Next.js chatbot UI that connects to a local Ollama instance via the REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like autocomplete server powered by Ollama code models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting and themes.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Official container images with CUDA support for running Ollama on NVIDIA GPUs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate that wraps the Ollama REST API using reqwest.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming.
